scope: Exact released Scout Bee fresh install, protected first-owner claim, keep-data uninstall, native-route removal, reinstall, retained identity/data verification, signed release publication, and isolated-target cleanup on the Cloudflare family profile.

defectsFoundAndRemediated.observation: Fresh Worker health did not consistently converge inside the former 60-second window.
defectsFoundAndRemediated.remediation: Bounded health polling was extended while preserving cancellation.

defectsFoundAndRemediated.observation: Wrangler telemetry documentation could be selected as the deployment address before the actual Worker URL.
defectsFoundAndRemediated.remediation: Scout now accepts only a URL whose hostname ends in .workers.dev, with telemetry-first regression coverage.

defectsFoundAndRemediated.observation: A keep-data reinstall would generate a new authentication root and invalidate retained credentials and sessions.
defectsFoundAndRemediated.remediation: Scout inspects the retained Worker secret set, preserves AUTH_ROOT_SECRET, requires no new bootstrap code, and deploys without a replacement secrets file.

remainingCombinedGate: Repeat clean install and keep-data uninstall/reinstall on the required Hyper-V Linux Compose profile.
